base: origin/main 4e7c21e (uncommitted worktree diff, 19 modified + 1 new file)

findings.title: Identity rotation extends beyond session-conditioned contracts
findings.detail: Empirical cross-version fvid probe (origin/main src vs worktree src): ALL structure specs (incl. close_location_value reset=False: fver_278ef6b1->fver_2c5cb4e7; prior_high_distance reset=False: fver_7c247e2c->fver_54f44b5f), ALL cross_market specs (synchronized_returns reset=False: fver_9ef3a16f->fver_85cf99bc), and bbo spread_zscore reset=False (fver_655f6c1b->fver_4b45b436) rotate because the field_roles marker is identity-hashed via input_metadata. Spec-sanctioned by scope item 2 (marker required wherever session_label is declared; structure/cross_market declare it for every feature) and functionally required (markerless contracts proved resolver-rejected: RuntimeInputResolverError 'labels must not be exposed as live feature inputs'); value-inert (FeatureValueRecord carries no session_label). Spec's named over-rotation examples hold bit-identical: ohlcv returns fver_643e91dc, volume_zscore fver_c40ed86a, rolling_range fver_f5a9433b, bbo mid fver_19588db5, bbo spread fver_4ce9dc01. CONSEQUENCE: the coordinator data-op phase must treat ALL structure + ALL cross_market + spread_zscore contracts as re-keyed; executor notes understate this blast radius.

findings.title: No pinned-hash identity regression test
findings.detail: The in-repo over-rotation guard only asserts session-template-change invariance under the new code; it cannot detect pre/post input_metadata churn (it did not catch W1). Pinned fvid hashes for unconditioned specs are absent; recommend follow-up.

findings.title: No DST test for the polars fast-path session derivation
findings.detail: All new tests/fixtures are winter (CST) timestamps. DST correctness rests on convert_time_zone + the shared-truth DST test (tests/unit/data/test_sessions_calendar.py, 14:30Z EST vs 13:30Z EDT both = 08:30 local). Gap pre-exists in the P194500 fast twins; derivation is template-parameter-driven. One summer-boundary parity fixture would close it.

findings.title: Session-label polars helpers duplicated across 4 fast twins
findings.detail: _template_session_label/_is_rth/_local_seconds repeated per twin; parameter-driven (no second truth) but drift-prone; candidate hoist into features/session_truth.py.

findings.title: Resolver acceptance tested via private symbol
findings.detail: Tests call runtime.input_resolver._reject_label_as_live_feature directly with SimpleNamespace; adequate and mutation-verified, but couples tests to a private function. input_resolver.py itself untouched.

findings.title: Executor skipped validation commands 3-5 per prompt
findings.detail: Reviewer ran them: full suite green modulo 3 named pre-existing env failures (reproduced on origin/main code), verify.py --smoke rc=0, all canaries pass. Handoff deviations are truthful.
